title: Release: astra feature/alex-work → main (v1.13.0)
author: adsvisory
body:
## Summary

### v1.13.0 — Onboarding maintenance toolkit (M1 + M2 + M3)
- **Locale parity linter** (`scripts/check-locale-parity.ts`) + CI workflow (`.github/workflows/locale-parity.yml`) flags missing/extra keys across all 20 namespaces
- **Tour preview URL** (`TourPreviewController`) — `?preview_tour={id}` validates, navigates, strips param, auto-starts after 400ms (DEV-only)
- **Developer docs** — `docs/ONBOARDING.md` (475 lines, 12 sections) with worked hint/tour examples; root `README.md`
- Known drift flagged (dp.json/billing/inbox keys missing in id/ja/zh); follow-up translations cleanup

### v1.12.1 — Per-page tours wired (A5 follow-up)
- `HeaderTourButton` maps routes → tours (/authority → authority, /visibility|/ → visibility, /domains → domains, /compare → compare; dashboard fallback)
- New `compare` tour (3 steps) with i18n for all 5 locales
- 13 `data-tour-target` attributes across Authority/VS/Domains/Compare pages (no logic changes)

### v1.12.0 — Onboarding foundation + hints + tours + announcements (Briefs A2/A4/A5)
- Foundation: `OnboardingProvider`, `useOnboardingState`, `useCompleteTour`, `useDismissHint`, `useResetOnboarding` backed by Sutra `/api/client/onboarding/*`
- i18n namespace `onboarding` across en/id/ja/zh/ko
- Primitives: `<Hint>` (Floating UI + ADS v3 glass, fails silently on missing target), `<EmptyState>`
- `<HintManager>` — one-hint-at-a-time with deterministic priority
- `<Tour>` — lazy-loaded react-joyride v3 with custom ADS tooltip + 5 tour definitions
- `<AnnouncementsBell>` — unread badge, auto-mark-seen on open, Lucide name lookup from payload
- `<ResetOnboardingButton>` in ProfilePanel
- Deps added: `@floating-ui/react`, `react-joyride@3`

### v1.11.1 — Public `/bot` page for avo-agent crawler
- `public/bot/index.html` info page (identity, purpose, robots.txt, WAF, contact)
- Vercel rewrite `/bot → /bot/index.html` before SPA catchall
- Linked from User-Agent of every Karsa crawl

### v1.11.0 — Report locales + VS/AS refinements
- `report.json` dictionaries for en/id/ja/ko/zh
- VS/AS component refinements across Authority, Visibility, Compare, DomainBook, DomainDetail, ContentBriefDetail
- New utils: `probe-rates.ts`, `vector.ts`
- Integrated from main: export-report domain fix, login redirect

## Version
v1.13.0

## Test plan
- [ ] `pnpm check:locales` passes after follow-up translation cleanup
- [ ] `?preview_tour=authority` on /authority starts the authority tour
- [ ] First-run hint flow: domain-switcher hint → nav hint (one at a time)
- [ ] Per-page tour button appears/hides based on route
- [ ] Compare tour on /compare steps through identity → pillars → gaps
- [ ] Announcements bell: unread badge, open marks seen after 1.5s, click-outside closes
- [ ] Reset onboarding (ProfilePanel) clears server state + localStorage
- [ ] `/bot` renders Avonetiq crawler info page
- [ ] Locale switch en/id/ja/ko/zh — all onboarding strings render
- [ ] Server-side PDF report in each locale via Sutra

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

feat: inbox system, content workspace, i18n expansion, component polish (v1.6.0)
feat: Ava domain briefs page, TopNav and router updates (v1.6.0)

title: Release: sutra feature/alex-work → main (v0.28.1)
author: adsvisory
body:
## Summary

### v0.28.1 — Admin announcements list
- `GET /api/admin/announcements?partner_id=…` for Artha admin UI
- Returns all rows (including unpublished drafts), optionally scoped to a partner
- OPS JWT via `app.validateAdminAuth`

### v0.28.0 — Onboarding state API + feature announcements (Brief A1)
- Migration 043: `sutra_user_onboarding` + `sutra_feature_announcements` tables (i18n across en/id/ja/zh/ko)
- Migration 044: user_id/organization_id UUID → TEXT for Better Auth nanoid compatibility
- Client routes: `/api/client/onboarding/{state,tours/complete,hints/dismiss,features/seen,reset}` + `/api/client/features/announcements` (locale-aware)
- Admin routes: `POST /api/admin/announcements`, `DELETE /api/admin/announcements/:key`
- partner_id scoping via `env.PARTNER_SLUG`

### v0.27.0 — Partner canonical_language
- Migration 042: `canonical_language` column on `sutra_partners` with 9-language check constraint
- Backfill: cacaFly → zh-TW, NAVICUS → ja, Avonetiq → en
- `PartnerRepo.create/update` + `PATCH /api/admin/partners/:id` accept `canonical_language`

### v0.26.0 — HTML report i18n
- Server-side locale loading via `src/lib/report-i18n.ts`
- Per-locale JSON dictionaries under `src/locales/`
- AS, VS, compare report HTML services localized
- Integrated from main: karsa-client read/trigger circuit breaker split, report timeout fix

## Version
v0.28.1

## Migrations
- 042_partner_canonical_language.sql
- 043_onboarding_system.sql
- 044_fix_onboarding_user_id_types.sql

## Test plan
- [ ] Run migrations 042, 043, 044 on dev DB
- [ ] Artha admin announcements page lists all rows (published + drafts) scoped by partner
- [ ] Client `/api/client/onboarding/state` returns expected shape for a logged-in user
- [ ] Tour completion + hint dismissal + feature-seen idempotent
- [ ] Reset clears server state
- [ ] `canonical_language` validated against 9-language union
- [ ] Generate AS/VS/compare report in all 5 locales — fallback to en when missing

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

title: Partner create 500 — include partner_slug in INSERT
author: optimize-avo
body: partner_slug is NOT NULL (migration 018) but was missing from the INSERT statement, causing a DB constraint violation on every new partner. Also sanitize the id input client-side (auto-lowercase + strip invalid chars) and surface field-level validation errors from the API.

commits.message: fix: partner create 500 — include partner_slug in INSERT

title: Discovery, focus, VS config, domains, Quick Peek client routes (v0.8.0–v0.9.0)
author: adsvisory
body:
## Summary
- **Discovery routes:** Focus discovery trigger, latest result, apply selected focuses, prompt CRUD (create/update/toggle/delete)
- **Focus routes:** Full focus CRUD proxy, PB status/trigger/rebuild, focus count enforcement by tier
- **VS Config routes:** Platform listing, snapshot CRUD, probe analytics, fVS history, autorun toggle, platform override, resolved config
- **Domain routes:** Domain list/detail/search proxy, Quick Peek signal endpoint with usage tracking
- **Account:** Avatar upload/clear with data URI + URL support
- **Infra:** Quick Peek usage repo + migration, pipeline detail migration, tier config additions, auth hardening, language passthrough on discovery

## Known issues from review (to fix post-merge or in follow-up)
- [ ] `x-dev-tier` header override active in production — should be dev-only
- [ ] Unvalidated type assertions on some request bodies (discovery prompts, account avatar) — add Zod schemas
- [ ] Quick Peek missing domain access check — allows scanning unowned domains
- [ ] Avatar endpoint missing audit logging and inconsistent response envelope
- [ ] Empty catch blocks in focus count checks (focuses.ts)
- [ ] Query params on vs-config routes not validated

## Test plan
- [ ] Discovery: trigger run, poll latest, apply focuses
- [ ] Focus CRUD: create, update, delete, list — respect tier limits
- [ ] VS: list platforms, trigger measurement, poll snapshot, view analytics
- [ ] Quick Peek: signal scan, monthly usage counter increments
- [ ] Avatar: upload data URI, upload URL, clear — verify DB update
- [ ] Auth: all routes require valid session, tier checks enforced

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

fix: security hardening — dev-tier bypass, input validation, audit logging

title: Introduces Insights Hub API and VS Features
author: adsvisory
body:
This release ships a new API contract for the Karsa Insights Hub and introduces significant client-facing features for Verisimilitude Score (VS), Discovery, and Quick Peek functionality.

### Summary of Changes

*   **Introduces Insights Hub API Contract:** Documents the new unified API for Authority Score (AS) industry benchmarks, combining measured and estimated domain data. This contract lays the foundation for future analytics and VS endpoints.
*   **Implements Verisimilitude Score (VS) Features:** Adds comprehensive client routes for configuring and accessing VS data, including AI platform management, historical snapshot viewing, detailed probe analytics, and platform override settings for fine-grained control.
*   **Adds Discovery and Focus Management:** Introduces new client endpoints to enable content discovery, manage strategic content 'focuses', trigger discovery runs, apply recommended focuses, and generate/manage prompt briefs and individual prompts.
*   **Integrates Quick Peek Functionality:** Provides a new client endpoint (`/api/client/domains/quick-peek`) to retrieve Authority Signal scores for any domain, complete with a 7-day cache and monthly usage quotas enforced per tier.
*   **Enhances User Account Management:** Enables clients to update their primary domain and user profile pictures, including validation for image inputs.
*   **Hardens Authentication:** Corrects email verification and magic link URLs to prevent hostname misconfiguration behind proxies and refines cookie handling for better compatibility with modern deployment environments.
*   **Updates Tier Configuration:** Adds new feature flags (`pipeline_detail`) and usage limits (`quick_peek_monthly`) to the tiering system, allowing granular control over access to the new functionalities.
*   **Enables Client Domain Removal:** Allows clients to remove domains from their organization through a new endpoint, ensuring proper access revocation and cache invalidation.

Relates to Creating-VS

commits.message: feat: discovery, focus, VS config client routes, pipeline detail migration, auth hardening (v0.8.0)
feat: discovery, VS config, domain routes, Quick Peek usage tracking, tier config fixes (v0.9.0)
